titleStmt.title: SII 36.281: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 281. (A.R. No. 281 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of 142 kalams of paddy to the temple of [Tiruvi]davandai, by Teṉnavan Pallavarāyaṉ, a kiḻāṉ of Tirumaṅgalam in Puḻal-nāḍu, a subdivision of Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam for feeding 50 brāhmaṇas in the Kalichchiṅgaṉmaṭam. The local veḷḷāḷars and the bhāgavathars received the paddy and agreed to measure out 71 kalams of paddy as interest into the temple treasury to be utilized for feeding brāhmaṇas during the 12 Amāvasi days in a year and for meeting other expenses.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ
ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Ēṉai man navaririyaluṟṟiḻitarat tikkaṉait
tun=taṉ cakkaranaṭātti vīrasimhāsanattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=taruḷiya ko
virājakecaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpatta
ñcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Āmūrk koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭu tiruvi
ṭavantaiyil Āḻvān koyilil Amāvāsitoṟum kalicciṅkan maṭattil brāhmaṇa bho[janam*]
paṇṇukaikku puḻaṟ koṭṭamāṉa Irājentracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭup puḻal nāṭṭu tirumaṅkalattu tiruma
ṅkalaṅkiḻān ciyanārveḷḷiyāṉa teṉnavaṉ pallavarayaṉ poliyūṭṭāka tiruviṭavantai
ṉa paṇṭārattu devakanmikkum kaṇakkaṉukkum śrī vayiṣṇavavāriyaṉukkum ceyvānukku mutalā
l kācukku nellu viṟkum marakkālāl Aḷakku mutal nūṟṟu nāṟpattiru kalam Iṉnel nūṟṟu nāṟpattiru kalamum
paṇṭārattil niṉṟum tiruviṭavantai veḷḷāḷarum Ivvūr śrībhāgavatarum kaikkoṇṭu Iṉnelluk kalat
tukku tūṇippatakkāka van=ta palicaiyāl nellu Eḻupattoru kalamum devar paṇṭāratte Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Aḷap
pomākavum paṇṭārattu Aḷan=ta nellu Eḻupattoru kalattukkum niman=tañ ceytapaṭi brāhmaṇan Oruvanukku bhojanattukku
aricikkum kaṟikkum Uppukkum miḷakukkum neykkun=tayirukkum kucakkalamum viṟakum pākkum veṟṟilaikku Uṇṇa
ilaikkum Uṭpaṭa nelluk kuṟuṇiyāka Amāvāsi Oṉṟukku brāhmaṇar Aimpatinmar Uṇṇa nellu nāṟ kalane patakkāka Amā
vāsi paṉniraṇṭukku nellu Aimpatiṉ kalamum maṭam pārttiruntu meḻuki Amāvāsi toṟum Aṭṭum brāhmaṇan Oruvanuk
ku nānāḻiyāka nellu patiṉaiṅ kalamum puṭavaikku nellu Iru kalamum viḷakkeṇṇaikku nellu nā
ṟ kalamum Āka palicaiyāl nellu Eḻupattoru kalamum koṇṭu Āṇṭu toṟum Inniman=tam muṭṭāme tiru
viṭavantai Ūromum śrī[ bhāgavata] rum celuttak kaṭavomākavum Eṅkaḷ perāl Eṭutta kalicciṅkaṉ maṭam Āṇṭutoṟum Aḻivu
terntu Innimantam celuttak kaṭavomāka Ippaṭi celuttomākil gaṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭai paṭṭa
ceyta pāvam Anupavippomāka cammatittom
Digital edition of SII 36.281 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
